title: galanthus reginae-olgae subsp. corcyrensis
intro: Galanthus reginae-olgae subsp. corcyrensis is a subspecies of the Galanthus reginae-olgae plant, commonly known as the Galanthus, a type of snowdrop. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Galanthus reginae-olgae subsp. corcyrensis include its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve congestion and promote the removal of mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Galanthus reginae-olgae subsp. corcyrensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's bulbs and leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or syrups for medicinal purposes.
